heading: Tenure of office of Sergeant at Arms
label: 5602 Tenure of office of Sergeant at Arms
text: Any person duly elected and qualified as Sergeant at Arms of the House of Representatives shall continue in said office until his successor is chosen and qualified, subject however, to removal by the House of Representatives.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 83 of this title
